resources.string: Your camera is disabled. Tap below to edit your settings.
Please click the button below to enable your selfie camera.
Keep your face in the centre
Hold your phone at eye level
Get Ready to Scan\nYour ID Card Chip
Hold Phone to ID Card\nto Scan NFC Chip
Please Enable NFC\nIn Your Device Settings\nTo Continue
Get Ready to Scan\nYour ePassport Chip
Hold Phone to Back\nCover of ePassport\nto Scan NFC Chip
Please frame your face in the small oval
This App is in Development Mode
Frame Your Face In The Oval
ID Type Not Supported\nPlease Use a Different ID
Enable NFC to start the scan
Disabling Fast Refresh because it requires a development bundle.
Switching to development bundle in order to enable Fast Refresh.
Failed to open debugger. Please check that the dev server is running and reload the app.
Failed to load bundle. Try restarting the bundler or reconnecting your device.
%1$s won\'t work unless you enable Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device.
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device.
%1$s won\'t run unless you update Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are currently updating.
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
failed to fetch OT banner data
Pass valid parameters to get the data
Pass a valid ISO Language code to get the data
Max number of profiles already created. Please delete one of the profiles to be able to add a new one.
This device does not have a fingerprint sensor
Too many attempts. Please try again later.
Go to detail about the category
This sample demonstrates how you can use registered fingerprints to authenticate the user before proceeding some actions such as purchasing an item.
You must consent to let Yoti, and our organisation, use your image. We do this in line with our privacy policy.
If you are a US resident, please see Yoti\'s US Biometric Policy for more information about how Yoti uses your biometrics.
We need camera access so we can confirm your identity.\n\nPlease go to Settings to enable camera access and try again.
Please read these guidelines before you try to scan your chip again.
Put your phone on top of your closed ePassport.
Put your phone in the right place on your ePassport.
We\'ll automatically scan your document when it\'s in position.
Scan the photo page in your passport
Please position it in the frame.
Capture the photo page in your passport
Try taking a photo of your document instead.
By continuing, you are giving Yoti consent to confirm your details with the document issuer.
We can\'t confirm your identity without your ID
Please don\'t close the app until we\'ve uploaded your %1$s. This could take a couple of minutes
Please upload another document that is up to 10MB.
Sorry, your file size is too big to upload
Don\'t worry, we can still confirm your details. We\'ll upload the photo of your passport to check that it is real and valid.
Unfortunately, we can\'t complete your check at the moment.
Hold your phone at eye level and fill the frame with your face.
We were unable to upload your scan
Going back means you\'ll need to re-scan your passport.
Do you want to scan your passport again?
Scanning the chip in your ePassport is the fastest, most secure way to get your details verified.
Place your phone on your closed ePassport.
Keep your phone still until the scan is complete.
Please check that you\'re connected to the internet and try again.
Before you try again, please check your document isn\'t password protected.\n\nIf the document is not password protected, please try changing the file type to a JPEG or PNG.
Please try again with a different file type.\n\nWe support PDF, JPEG and PNG.
We can\'t confirm your address without a document
You\'ve been inactive for a while. For your security, your session has automatically expired.
We couldn\'t complete your request. Please try again.
Sorry, there seems to be a technical problem
Select the type of passport you have to continue.
Scan not working?\nTry taking a photo instead.
Take a photo of your ID document
Hold your camera up to a Yoti QR code
We don\'t recognise this Aadhaar QR code
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
Camera cannot focus. Try scanning under different light.
Scan the back side of the document
Move the document from the edge
Scan the front side of the document
Camera not allowed by permission settings.
License does not permit custom camera activity!
Please start the scanning process over.
You will now be taken to permission settings where you need to give camera permission to the app.
Please give the camera permission in the app permission settings.
Failed to initialize native library. Please check ADB error log for more details.
This feature is supported for Android 4.1 and newer
This feature is not supported on camera without autofocus
This feature is not supported because of the technical properties of your device
Watch out for flashlight glare.\nGently move your ID around to avoid it.
Invalid license key! Please check ADB error log for more details.
Unable to read the document. Please try again.
Place the BACK SIDE of the ID card in the frame and wait for automatic scan
Place the FRONT SIDE of the ID card in the frame and wait for automatic scan
Slightly move ID to eliminate glare.
It appears the information on the document is inconsistent. Please try scanning again.
Scan the front side of a supported document.
Tap to switch to selecting a day
Tap to switch to selecting a year
Please select at least one category
Not updating data as the data received from server is same
Profile already active, not downloading the data/not parsing the data again.
Switch profile not supported without SDK initialized.
Continue without accepting Banner. This will dismiss banner and save default consent values
No data found to render the UI, Please initialize the SDK and try again.
Unable to open a link. Malformed url.
Unable to open a link. The application to handle this link is not installed.
The language code passed is not supported by the platform, Data may be returned in the default language if language code is not configured in OneTrust admin UI
Have you published the SDK_VERSION SDK data in the OneTrust portal?
The face scan shows Yoti you\'re a real person.
I confirm I have read, understood and agree to continue.
If we check your age, we delete your face scan right away.
If we do a full identity check, we delete the photo within 3 years and your face scan right away.
Yoti\'s software matches this scan to your ID to make sure no-one is pretending to be you.

To check your identity, we use Yoti software.\n\nFor security, simply take a photo of yourself. We use this photo to create a digital map of your face. The digital map is also known as a face scan – a type of biometric.
We\'d like you to take a photo of your Passport. Please make sure that the photo you take is clear and readable.
Get ready to scan your driving licence
We\'d like you to take a photo of your %1$s. Please make sure that the photo you take is clear and readable.
We\'d like you to take a photo of the front and back of your %1$s. Please make sure that the photos you take of each side are clear and readable.
Please add another document that is in date.
Please make sure your document is in date and try again.
You have now reached the maximum number of retries.
Your document is out of date
Before you continue, please check that your %1$s:
Please check your document issue date
Please note that we only accept this document issued on or after %1$s.\n\nIf your document was issued before this date, please select another document.
Please note that we only accept this document issued on or after %1$s.
Before scanning the customer\'s Passport please check:
Make sure it\'s in focus, fits in the frame and is readable.
Is this photo clear, in focus and readable?
We are going to check your details with an identity verification provider.
I don\'t have any of these documents
Select the type of ID document you want to add
Select the type of ID document you want to add
We need to confirm your identity so you can use our services. To do this, we ask you to take a photo of your ID or upload a photo of it from your device.
Why do I need to add a photo of my ID?
To help confirm your identity, we ask you to add a photo of your official ID document, such as your passport, national ID or driving licence.\n\nOur verification process is powered by Yoti.

An ePassport is a traditional passport with an electronic chip that contains your biometric details. Look out for the small symbol on the front cover.\n\nIf you have an Android or an iPhone 7 or above, you can scan the chip in your ePassport to get your details verified in the fastest, most secure way.

When you add a photo of your ID, it is uploaded using a secure connection to keep it safe. We use Yoti's technology and expert security team to check that your ID is real and valid.

Yoti is committed to protecting its users' privacy and will never mine or sell your data to third parties.

Yoti stores your ID document details and the results of their checks on our behalf, and we decide how long to keep them there.

We can delete them from Yoti's system at any time. When we retrieve the results, we get a copy of the information into our systems.
What happens to the photo of my ID?

Yoti is a global digital identity platform and free app that gives you a simple and secure way to prove who you are online and in person.

We use Yoti's technology and expert security team to check your details and confirm your identity.

Yoti is committed to protecting its users' privacy and its systems are built in a way that means it cannot mine or sell your data to third parties.
In the next step, we\'ll ask you to take a quick scan of your face.
Make sure your face is positioned within the frame.
Please make sure your face is positioned within the frame and follow the prompts to make a successful capture.
We couldn\'t process your face, please try again.
We spotted someone else in the frame, make sure there is no one else around when you capture your face.
The image you provided seems too bright, please make sure the light is even when you are capturing your face.
The image you provided seems too dark, please make sure the light is even when you are capturing your face.
Someone else is in the frame
Hold your phone at eye level and only fill the frame with your face.
Find an area with good lighting.

Sometimes we\'re unable to create a digital map of your face, or we might not get a clear enough scan. You get three attempts to scan your face.\n\nIf you use up these attempts, you may be able to try again later. If you\'re still facing issues, you can contact our customer support team.
You\'ll need to enable camera access and we\'ll take a quick scan of your face.\n\nFind an area with good lighting, make sure your camera is at eye level, and fill the frame with your face.

This face scan is automated and helps keep your data secure.\n\nTo confirm you\'re a real person and that no-one is pretending to be you, Yoti\'s software matches images from the scan to the photo on your ID document.

We capture images of your face during your scan, which are uploaded using a secure connection to keep them safe.

Yoti uses effective anti-spoofing technology to check these images and make sure you're a real person.

If the technology isn't sure enough, a member of Yoti's expert security team will check the images.

Yoti stores the images, face scan and the results of their checks on our behalf, and we decide how long to keep them there. We can delete them from Yoti's system at any time. When we retrieve the results we get a copy of the information into our systems.

As part of confirming your identity, we need to capture a digital map of your face in a scan.

This proves you're a real person and is a security check to prevent bots or people impersonating you.

Our verification process is powered by Yoti.
What do I do if I can\'t scan my face?
How do I prove I\'m a real person?
What is this face scan used for?
What happens to the scan of my face?
Is the photo of your face clear and in focus?
A quick scan of your face
We couldn\'t detect your document\'s barcode
We couldn\'t see some of your details
This could be due to the quality of the photo, that part of the document is missing, or that it\'s the wrong document.\n\nTry retaking the photo of your document.
This could be due to the quality of the photo, that part of the document is missing, or that it\'s the wrong document.\n\nTry retaking the photo of your document or select a different document type.
Before you try again, please be sure to:
We couldn\'t detect the back of your document
Please use a photo taken in natural light
Check the barcode is clear and in focus
Use the document you chose earlier
Check your ID photo and details aren\'t covered
Confirm your details are clear and legible
Use a colour photo of your document
Check the photo doesn\'t have any shadows or glares
We couldn\'t detect the correct document
Please take a photo of the physical document

If you\'ve already completed your check, there\'s no need to do anything further.\n\nIf you\'re trying to complete a check but keep seeing this screen, please contact the organisation that requested the check.
Please read our guidelines before you try to scan your face again.
We couldn\'t get a clear scan of your face
We couldn\'t get a clear scan of your face
In the next step, we\'ll ask you to take a quick scan of your face.
Hold your phone at eye level
Find an area with good lighting
Find an area with good lighting.
Please don\'t close the app while your scan is uploading

As part of confirming your identity, we need to capture a digital map of your face in a scan.

This proves you're a real person and is a security check to prevent bots or people impersonating you.

Our verification process is powered by Yoti.

We capture images of your face during your scan, which are uploaded using a secure connection to keep them safe.

Yoti uses effective anti-spoofing technology to check these images and make sure you're a real person.

If the technology isn't sure enough, a member of Yoti's expert security team will check the images.

Yoti stores the images, face scan and the results of their checks on our behalf, and we decide how long to keep them there. We can delete them from Yoti's system at any time. When we retrieve the results we get a copy of the information into our systems.
What happens to the scan of my face?
You\'ll need to enable camera access and we\'ll take a quick scan of your face.\n\nFind an area with good lighting, make sure your camera is at eye level, and fill the frame with your face.
How do I prove I\'m a real person?

This face scan is automated and helps keep your data secure.\n\nTo confirm you\'re a real person and that no-one is pretending to be you, Yoti\'s software matches images from the scan to the photo on your ID document.
What is this face scan used for?

Sometimes we\'re unable to create a digital map of your face, or we might not get a clear enough scan. You get three attempts to scan your face. If you use up these attempts, you may be able to try again later. If you\'re still facing issues, you can contact our customer support team.
What do I do if I can\'t scan my face?

Yoti is a global digital identity platform and free app that gives you a simple and secure way to prove who you are online and in person.

We use Yoti's technology and expert security team to make sure you're a real person.

Yoti is committed to protecting its users' privacy and its systems are built in a way that means it cannot mine or sell your data to third parties.
Please exit and contact the organisation that asked you to confirm your identity.
Please exit and contact the organisation that asked you to complete this process.
As a result, we can\'t confirm your identity.\n\nPlease exit and contact the organisation that asked you to confirm your identity.
As a result, we can\'t confirm your address.\n\nPlease exit and contact the organisation that asked you to complete this process.
We can\'t confirm your identity without your ID
We can\'t confirm your address without a document
Sorry, we don\'t accept documents from your country
We\'ll ask you to take a photo or upload your document in the next step. This document must include:
A date within the last 3 months
A date within the last 12 months
The details are clear and in focus
The document isn\'t covered by anything
The document must be in a PDF, JPEG or PNG format.
Please make sure the photo you capture or upload follows these guidelines.
If you are uploading your document, please also make sure the file:
The file size must be under 10MB.
Is this document clear, in focus and readable?
Select the document you want to add

We need to confirm your identity so you can use our services.\n\nTo do this, we ask you to take or upload a photo of an official ID document, such as a passport or driving licence, as well as your proof of address.
Why do I need to add a photo of my proof of address?

As part of confirming your identity, we need to check your address.

That's why we ask you to add a photo of your proof of address document, such as a utility bill or bank statement.

Our verification process is powered by Yoti.

When you add a photo of your document, it is uploaded using a secure connection to keep it safe.

We use Yoti's technology and expert security team to check that your document is real and valid. Yoti is committed to protecting its users' privacy and will never mine or sell your data to third parties.

Yoti stores your document details and the results of their checks on our behalf, and we decide how long to keep them there.

We can delete them from Yoti's system at any time. When we retrieve the results we get a copy of the information into our systems.
What happens to the photo of my proof of address?
The proof of address document you add must belong to you.\n\nIt should include your full name, residence address and the name of the issuing organisation.
What should my proof of address include?

Yoti is a global digital identity platform and free app that gives you a simple and secure way to prove who you are online and in person.

We use Yoti's technology and expert security team to check your details and confirm your identity.

Yoti is committed to protecting its users' privacy and its systems are built in a way that means it cannot mine or sell your data to third parties.
We couldn\'t detect your face, or it was out of bounds, or at an incorrect angle.\n\nYou have now reached the maximum number of retries.
We couldn\'t process the image due to the quality
We\'ve uploaded your details.\n\nOnce we\'ve reviewed them, we\'ll let you know if they\'ve been approved.
You\'ll need a government-issued ID document, like a passport, driving licence or national ID.
We\'ll ask you to take a quick scan of your face.
We have everything we need to confirm your identity.
We have everything we need to confirm your address.
To do this, we\'ll need the following information:
A photo of your ID document
A photo of your first %1$s ID document
A photo of your fourth %1$s ID document
A photo of your second %1$s ID document
A photo of your third %1$s ID document
A photo of your first ID document
A photo of your fourth ID document
A photo of your second ID document
A photo of your third ID document
A fourth %1$s to confirm your address
A quick scan of your face
You\'ll need a document to confirm your address.
A second %1$s to confirm your address
A third %1$s to confirm your address
We\'ll ask you for a document that contains your address (for example, a utility bill).
This process should only take a few minutes.
This process should only take a few minutes.
Before we start, here\'s what you need to know:

Yoti is trusted by governments and regulators for adhering to the highest standards of security.\n\nIt is certified for its leading security management and processes, and its systems are regularly tested to ensure your data is safe.

In the UK, our identity verification is carried out by TransUnion.

Checking your details with TransUnion will leave an identity check footprint on your credit file that references Yoti. This does not affect your credit score.

Aristotle performs these checks for the rest of the world.
Who do you use to confirm my identity?

When you add a document that contains an address, it is sent, along with your name and date of birth, to an identity verification provider.\n\nThis provider will confirm that you really do live there and we will use Yoti to run a check on our behalf.
How do you check my details?
To complete this check, you will need to upload a different ID document to the one you have already uploaded.\n\nPlease tap Try again to select a different document to upload.
To complete this check, you will need to upload a different ID document to the one you have already uploaded.\n\nPlease tap Try again to upload a different document.
This might be because it is the wrong issuing country, document type or page.\n\nYou have now reached the maximum number of retries.

Your document does not match the selected document type or issuing country.\n\nPlease tap Try again to scan a different document. The list of ID documents and issuing countries we accept will be displayed.
Your document is not accepted for this step.\n\nPlease tap Try again to scan the correct document.

The document you uploaded is either not a document we accept or does not match the issuing country selected.\n\nPlease tap Try again to upload a different document. The list of ID documents and issuing countries we accept will be displayed.

The document you uploaded is either not a document we accept or does not match the issuing country selected.\n\nPlease tap Try again to upload a different document. The ID document and issuing country we accept will be displayed.
